mapper.sql: id, source_id, order_no, item_no, split_no, model_no, quantity, transtype_code, delivery_time_H, delivery_time_W, delivery_time_A, invoice_id, invoice_no, del_flag, create_time, creator, update_time, updator, remark
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_po_delivery_fact
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_po_delivery_fact (id, source_id, order_no, item_no, split_no, model_no, quantity, transtype_code, delivery_time_H, delivery_time_W, delivery_time_A, invoice_id, invoice_no, del_flag, create_time, creator, update_time, updator, remark) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{sourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{transtypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deliveryTimeH,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deliveryTimeW,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deliveryTimeA,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{delFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

source_id,
order_no,
item_no,
split_no,
model_no,
quantity,
transtype_code,
delivery_time_H,
delivery_time_W,
delivery_time_A,

invoice_no,

create_time,
creator,
update_time,
updator,
remark,

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_po_delivery_fact
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
source_id = #{record.sourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
item_no = #{record.itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
split_no = #{record.splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
transtype_code = #{record.transtypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delivery_time_H = #{record.deliveryTimeH,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delivery_time_W = #{record.deliveryTimeW,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delivery_time_A = #{record.deliveryTimeA,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
invoice_id = #{record.invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
del_flag = #{record.delFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updator = #{record.updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.ops_po_delivery_fact set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, source_id = #{record.sourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, item_no = #{record.itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, split_no = #{record.splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, transtype_code = #{record.transtypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delivery_time_H = #{record.deliveryTimeH,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delivery_time_W = #{record.deliveryTimeW,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delivery_time_A = #{record.deliveryTimeA,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, invoice_id = #{record.invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, del_flag = #{record.delFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updator = #{record.updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.ops_po_delivery_fact
source_id = #{sourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
item_no = #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
split_no = #{splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
transtype_code = #{transtypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delivery_time_H = #{deliveryTimeH,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delivery_time_W = #{deliveryTimeW,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delivery_time_A = #{deliveryTimeA,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
invoice_id = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updator = #{updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_po_delivery_fact set source_id = #{sourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, item_no = #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, split_no = #{splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, transtype_code = #{transtypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delivery_time_H = #{deliveryTimeH,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delivery_time_W = #{deliveryTimeW,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delivery_time_A = #{deliveryTimeA,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, invoice_id = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updator = #{updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
